details: The agent ran extensive kubectl commands against the cluster (get pods, describe pods, get events, get svc, get nodes, etc.) and correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause categories: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap), fault-crashloop (app crashes on DB connection failure), fault-endpoints (service selector mismatch app=web-backend-v2 vs app=web-backend), fault-imagepull (non-existent image tag), fault-init (init container CrashLoopBackOff due to locked migration table), fault-multicontainer (sidecar DNS resolution failure), fault-oom (OOMKilled exceeding memory limits), fault-pvc (missing StorageClass fast-ssd), fault-readiness (readiness probe failing on wrong port), fault-rollout (stuck rollout due to bad image), fault-unschedulable (node selector mismatch for disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5). The healthy namespace was correctly not flagged. All diagnoses are supported by actual command output evidence.
